samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Divides a 16-bit dividend by an 8-bit divisor using combinational logic. Extracts higher bits of the dividend, compares them with the divisor, sets the quotient to 1 if the dividend bits are greater, and sets it to 0 otherwise. Uses the difference as the remainder, concatenates the remainder with the highest remaining 1-bit of the dividend, and repeats the process until all dividend bits are processed.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit dividend.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit divisor.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit quotient.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit remainder.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Dividing a 16-bit number by an 8-bit number requires extracting the higher bits of the dividend,
        // comparing them with the divisor, setting the quotient to 1 if the dividend bits are greater,
        // and setting it to 0 otherwise. Using the difference as the remainder, concatenate the remainder
        // with the highest remaining 1-bit of the dividend, and continue the process until all dividend bits are processed.
        
        reg [15:0] a_reg;
        reg [7:0] b_reg;
        reg [15:0] result_reg;
        reg [15:0] odd_reg;
        always @(A or B) begin
            a_reg <= A;
            b_reg <= B;
        end
        
        integer i;
        always @(A or B) begin
            for(i = 15; i >= 8; i=i-1) begin
                if(a_reg[i -: 8] > b_reg) begin
                    result_reg[i] <= 1;
                    odd_reg[i] <= a_reg[i -: 8] - b_reg;
                end else begin
                    result_reg[i] <= 0;
                    odd_reg[i] <= a_reg[i -: 8];
                end
                
                if(odd_reg[i] == 0 && i != 8) begin
                    odd_reg[i-1] <= a_reg[i-1];
                end
            end
            
            for(i = 7; i >= 0; i=i-1) begin
                if(odd_reg[i] == 1) begin
                    result_reg[i] <= 1;
                    odd_reg[i] <= 0;
                end else begin
                    result_reg[i] <= 0;
                    odd_reg[i] <= 0;
                end
            end
        end
        
        assign result = result_reg;
        assign odd = odd_reg;
    </implementation>
    
</module>
